benefits.description: Face looks better than ever after skin flaked off; skin improvement post-purging

side_effects.description: Gnarly cystic acne patches (pre-existing condition exacerbated) and eczema patches on face (never had before)

protocol_notes: User interpreted skin reactions as peptide working and continued. Used salicylic acid serum and collagen moisturizer twice daily to manage. Age-related use. Consider this purging/remodeling phase normal for mild topical skin treatments.
